description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a small yard with several trees and shrubs. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a covered porch, a large window above the garage, and a driveway leading to the street. The side elevations display a series of asymmetrically placed windows of varying sizes, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house includes a patio area and additional large windows, suggesting an open-plan living space. The exterior is finished in a combination of light and dark gray materials, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The landscaping is minimal, with grass and a few mature trees providing greenery around the structure.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a sleek gray exterior, surrounded by a small landscaped yard and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, driveway, and a large window above the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated profile, asymmetrical window arrangement, and landscaping along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a patio area, large windows, and a more private yard space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional windows and landscaping, mirroring the elongated structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a modern door, steps leading up from the driveway, and a small porch area.
